revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月初三]][[zh:二月初三]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 3|qq=February 3}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}. == Events == * {{ill|Bunpō|en|Bunpō|qid=Q987788|lt=Bunpō|1=Bunpō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1317|en|1317|qid=Q5745|lt=1317|1=1317}} {{ill|March 16|en|March 16|qid=Q2417|lt=March 16|1=March 16}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Shōwa (1312–1317)|en|Shōwa (1312–1317)|qid=Q1324807|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa (1312–1317)}} to {{ill|Bunpō|en|Bunpō|qid=Q987788|lt=Bunpō|1=Bunpō}}. * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1717|en|1717|qid=Q6895|lt=1717|1=1717}} {{ill|March 15|en|March 15|qid=Q2403|lt=March 15|1=March 15}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|en|Tokugawa Yoshimune|qid=Q319664|lt=Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune}} selected the 【Fushin Bugyō】 and appointed {{ill|Ōoka Tadasuke|en|Ōoka Tadasuke|qid=Q1054143|lt=Ōoka Tadasuke|1=Ōoka Tadasuke}} as the [[Machihikeshi|Edo South Machi Bugyō]]. * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}} {{ill|March 13|en|March 13|qid=Q2400|lt=March 13|1=March 13}}) – The Russian warship Posadnik briefly occupied Tsushima Imozaki; it demanded a perpetual lease of Imozaki but withdrew about six months later following intervention by the British Navy. == Births == * {{ill|Kanpō|en|Kanpō|qid=Q1145798|lt=Kanpō|1=Kanpō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1743|en|1743|qid=Q7580|lt=1743|1=1743}} {{ill|February 26|en|February 26|qid=Q2359|lt=February 26|1=February 26}}) – {{ill|Shiohara Tadasuke|ja|塩原太助|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiohara Tadasuke|1=Tasuke Shiobara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11428625}}, a wealthy merchant (died {{ill|1816|en|1816|qid=Q6953|lt=1816|1=1816}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1816|en|1816|qid=Q6953|lt=1816|1=1816}} {{ill|March 1|en|March 1|qid=Q2393|lt=March 1|1=March 1}}) – {{ill|Kawatake Mokuami|en|Kawatake Mokuami|qid=Q1737345|lt=Kawatake Mokuyami|1=Kawatake Mokuami}}, a kabuki playwright (died {{ill|1893|en|1893|qid=Q7840|lt=1893|1=1893}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1829|en|1829|qid=Q7572|lt=1829|1=1829}} {{ill|March 7|en|March 7|qid=Q2394|lt=March 7|1=March 7}}) – {{ill|Nishi Zhou|ja|西周|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi Zhou|1=Nishi Zhou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11627420}}, an enlightenment scholar (died {{ill|1897|en|1897|qid=Q7847|lt=1897|1=1897}}). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1845|en|1845|qid=Q7636|lt=1845|1=1845}} {{ill|March 10|en|March 10|qid=Q2397|lt=March 10|1=March 10}}) – {{ill|Hayashi Miso|ja|林甕臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayashi Miso|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a waka poet and linguist (died {{ill|1922|en|1922|qid=Q2165|lt=1922|1=1922}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1637|en|1637|qid=Q6889|lt=1637|1=1637}} {{ill|February 27|en|February 27|qid=Q2361|lt=February 27|1=February 27}}) – {{ill|Hon'ami Kōetsu|en|Hon'ami Kōetsu|qid=Q3139920|lt=Hon'ami Kōetsu|1=Hon'ami Kōetsu}}, a calligrapher and artisan (born {{ill|1558|en|1558|qid=Q6601|lt=1558|1=1558}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|2|2|4|1|3|3|2|0203|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月初三]]
{{translated page|ja|2月3日 (旧暦)|version=88313073|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[ko:음력 2월 3일]] [[ja:2月3日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月初三]]
[[ar:February 3 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月初三]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月初三]] {{wikidata link|Q839187}} [[Category:Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 3 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar February]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
